title: Idiotic Font
description: Resource pack that alters the default minecraft font to be "mildly annoying, in a good way"
body:
You know the default Minecraft font?

Ever wished if it was, as described by one of the people I shown this to, **"mildly annoying, in a good way"**?

No...?

Aw, okay...

![Font showcase in a written book](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/8744e48334d7cd135cb52b6818992dfd4c9a2b2d.png)
![Font show case on the Title screen](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/f82dbeb185c67e2126102f78fc4652d6de990bfa.png)

_Based on the Minecraft Alpha 1.0.16 Versions ARG custom font._
